openai_api_key.description: Your OpenAI API key for ChatGPT (starts with sk-). Validated against OpenAI API on install.

system_prompt.description: Custom prompt that defines how ChatGPT should behave when analyzing tickets
system_prompt.default_value: You are a customer support assistant. Analyze the following support ticket and generate a professional, empathetic and helpful response. Respond in JSON format with this structure: {"status": {"emoji": "😊", "status": "Status description"}, "response": "Your detailed response here"}

debug_enabled.description: Enable debug logs in the console for diagnostics
